allow: Bash(node -e "const { execSync } = require\(''child_process''\); try { const out = execSync\(''npx next info'', { timeout: 15000, encoding: ''utf8'' }\); console.log\(out\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''stdout:'', e.stdout\); console.log\(''stderr:'', e.stderr\); }")

hooks.command: node -e "var d='';process.stdin.on('data',function(c){d+=c;});process.stdin.on('end',function(){try{var e=JSON.parse(d);var fp=(e.tool_input&&(e.tool_input.file_path||e.tool_input.path))||'';if(!fp){return;}var skills=[];var isTs=/[.](ts)$/.test(fp);var isTsx=/[.](tsx)$/.test(fp);var isTest=/[.](test|spec)[.](ts|tsx)$/.test(fp);var isE2e=fp.includes('/e2e/');var isApi=fp.includes('/api/')&&!isTest;var isDb=fp.includes('/lib/db/');var isAuth=fp.includes('/auth/')||fp.includes('/two-factor/');var isComp=isTsx&&!isApi&&!isTest;var isPure=isTs&&!isTest&&!isApi&&!isDb&&!isAuth;if(isDb)skills.push('drizzle-orm','supabase-postgres-best-practices');if(isAuth&&fp.includes('two-factor'))skills.push('two-factor-authentication-best-practices');else if(isAuth)skills.push('better-auth-best-practices');if(isTest&&!isE2e)skills.push('vitest');if(isE2e)skills.push('playwright-best-practices');if(isApi)skills.push('nodejs-backend-patterns');if(isComp){skills.push('vercel-react-best-practices','tailwind-css-patterns','accessibility','frontend-design');skills.push('simplify');}if(isPure)skills.push('typescript-advanced-types');if(skills.length>0){console.log('[SKILLS] For '+fp.split('/').pop()+' invoke: '+skills.map(function(s){return '/'+s;}).join(', '));}}catch(ex){}});"

node -e "var d='';process.stdin.on('data',function(c){d+=c;});process.stdin.on('end',function(){try{var e=JSON.parse(d);var isErr=e.tool_response&&(e.tool_response.isError===true);var out=String((e.tool_response&&e.tool_response.stdout)||'')+' '+String((e.tool_response&&e.tool_response.stderr)||'');var hasTsErr=out.indexOf('error TS')!==-1;var hasModErr=out.indexOf('Cannot find module')!==-1;if(!isErr&&!hasTsErr&&!hasModErr){return;}var cmd=String((e.tool_input&&e.tool_input.command)||'unknown').slice(0,60);var patterns=[];var m1=out.match(/error TS[0-9]+:[^]{0,100}/g);if(m1)patterns=patterns.concat(m1.slice(0,2));var m2=out.match(/Cannot find module[^]{0,80}/g);if(m2)patterns=patterns.concat(m2.slice(0,1));if(patterns.length===0){patterns=['(error detected)'];}var fs=require('fs');var mf='c:/Users/Jhonson/.claude/projects/c--Users-Jhonson-Desktop-Silexar-Pulse-Antygravity/memory/feedback_errors.md';var ts=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);var entry='- ['+ts+'] '+cmd+' => '+patterns.join(' | ')+String.fromCharCode(10);if(fs.existsSync(mf)){fs.appendFileSync(mf,entry);}console.log('[ERROR-LEARNED] '+entry.trim());}catch(ex){}});"

node -e "var d='';process.stdin.on('data',function(c){d+=c;});process.stdin.on('end',function(){try{var e=JSON.parse(d);var fp=(e.tool_input&&(e.tool_input.file_path||e.tool_input.path))||'';if(!fp||!/[.](ts|tsx)$/.test(fp)){return;}var root='c:/Users/Jhonson/Desktop/Silexar Pulse Antygravity';var rel=fp.startsWith(root)?fp.slice(root.length+1):fp;var ex=require('child_process').execSync;try{var r=ex('node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix '+JSON.stringify(rel),{cwd:root,timeout:8000,encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']});if(r&&r.trim()){console.log('[ESLint] '+r.trim().slice(0,300));}else{console.log('[ESLint] '+rel+': OK');}}catch(le){var msg=String(le.stdout||le.stderr||le.message).trim().slice(0,400);console.log('[ESLint errors in '+rel+'] '+msg);}}catch(ex2){}});"
